title: Bugoff Sticky Fly Glue Trap Tape, Pack of 18 Piece, Drosophila Insect Flies Catcher Strips, Fruit Fly Sticky Trap for Indoors, Outdoors, Garden, House, Greenhouse, Home Use, Red
bullet_points: Reliable Material - The Bugoff fly glue trap uses selected top-class material to ensure the red string and sticky paper trap are durable and provide long service life. Both sides of the paper service with glue ensure the insert cannot escape from this trap.

Flying Insert Targeted - The easy hanging ribbon design targets catching flying insects, such as mosquitoes, flies, gipsy moths and other flying pests. The sticky glue paper trap with the fruit scent to mainly attracted flies around your house.

Eco-Friendly - In order to serve on several occasions and places, our Bugoff Sticky fruit fly trap is designed to be non-toxic and safe for children and pets, ideal for indoors and outdoors. Please use soap and water to wash if you touch the sticky tape.

Easy to Use - The Flycatcher glue tape is easy to use. Open the cover with the red string. Pull the sticky paper tape from the tube. Hanging it with attractants is preferable, and a trap is set up. No more baiting, poisons, vapour, and mess. If the tape stuck to your clothes, please use vegetable oil and a cleaning agent to remove the glue.

Always Better Solution: Compared with sprays and other liquid solutions on the market, Fly Glue Trap Tape is easy to use. Safe for children and pets but cleaner and simpler, just put it where you see the fly, or you want to keep the ant away from.
